news.headline: Bitcoin miner Iris Energy faces lawsuit alleging exaggeration of data center capacity in Texas due to poor fit for computing.
news.summary: The lawsuit alleges that Iris Energy was aware or should have been aware that its location in Childress County, Texas was unsuitable for high-performance computing.

news.headline: Veris Health, subsidiary of PAVmed, receives $1.8M NIH grant to improve cancer care for underserved patients.
news.summary: A grant has been awarded to PAVmed Inc. (Nasdaq: PAVM) to support research aimed at enhancing the Veris Cancer Care Platform for medically underserved cancer patients. This initiative will be carried out in collaboration with an academic cancer center. The grant is helping to fund these efforts, which are set to significantly benefit patients in need. This development was announced in New York on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Beamr to be a Bronze Sponsor at Demuxed 2024 in SF, Oct 16-17, a key event for video professionals.
news.summary: In Herzliya, Israel, on October 10, 2024, Beamr Imaging Ltd. (NASDAQ: BMR), known for its innovative video optimization solutions, revealed its participation as a bronze sponsor at the Demuxed 2024 conference in San Francisco on October 16-17, 2024. Demuxed is a prominent event for video industry experts and professionals.

news.headline: Cympire wins contract to provide cybersecurity simulator platform for IDF, integrating Cyber Range technology and training services.
news.summary: In Raanana, Israel, on October 10, 2024, Cympire secured a contract to deliver its cybersecurity training and assessment platform to the IDF. The agreement includes integrating advanced Cyber Range technology, online training content, and training services. This partnership marks a significant milestone for Cympire as they support the IDF in enhancing its cybersecurity capabilities.

news.headline: Solo Stove partners with NY Islanders, becoming first exclusive jersey patch partner and naming plaza "Solo Stove Plaza."
news.summary: Solo Stove has been announced as the inaugural and sole jersey patch partner for the Islanders organization. The plaza located outside UBS Arena will now be known as Solo Stove Plaza as part of the entitlement partnership. This news was revealed in Belmont Park, N.Y., on October 10, 2024. The Islanders have entered into an exclusive partnership with Solo Stove, naming them as the pioneer jersey patch partner. Additionally, Solo Stove Plaza will showcase the collaboration between the two entities. Video and photo resources regarding this development are accessible.

news.headline: Jacobs awarded contract by CG Semi for engineering of new OSAT facility in India with CG, Renesas, and Stars Microelectronics.
news.summary: In Dallas on October 10, 2024, Jacobs, a company listed under NYSE as J, was selected by CG Semi Private Limited, a Joint Venture involving CG, Renesas Electronics Corporation, and Stars Microelectronics (Thailand) Public Co. Ltd., for engineering design work on CG Semi's upcoming Outsourced Semiconductor project.

news.headline: Perimeter Medical completes final closing of non-brokered private placement. TSXV: PINK, OTC: PYNKF involved.
news.summary: Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc., based in Toronto and Dallas, recently completed its second and final closing of a non-brokered offering, as announced on October 10, 2024. The company, listed on the TSXV as PINK and OTC as PYNKF, is a commercial-stage medical technology firm.

news.headline: Bellatora Inc. changes name to Kinetic Seas Inc. with ticker symbol "KSEZ." Focus on AI solutions. (Character count: 96)
news.summary: SCHAUMBURG, Illinois - On October 10, 2024, Kinetic Seas (formerly known as Bellatora Inc. and trading under OTC:KSEZ) unveiled its new corporate identity, showcasing a strategic shift towards AI solutions for businesses. The company, renowned for its groundbreaking technologies, has rebranded as Kinetic Seas to align with its focus on artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Company Vireo Growth Inc. reveals changes in leadership.

Global bio-based acrylonitrile market to hit estimated USD 381.9 million by 2034, with 8.1% CAGR. Major players: AnQore, Solvay, Asahi Kasei, Trinseo. Market driven by demand from electronics, automotive, and packaging industries. Sustainability benefits include reduced carbon footprint and decreased dependency on traditional energy sources. Industry focuses on yield enhancement, cost reduction, and process optimization.Total characters: 347
news.summary: The global bio-based acrylonitrile market was at US$162.2 million in 2023, projected to grow at an 8.1% CAGR from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$381.9 million by 2034. Top companies investing in bio-based feedstock and production facilities to meet demand from industries like electronics, automotive, and packaging include AnQore, Solvay, Asahi Kasei Corporation, and Trinseo. Bio-based acrylonitrile, derived from organic sources, is used in making acrylic fibers, resins, and polymers for electronics, packaging, and automobile components. Benefits include reduced carbon footprint, improved sustainability ratings, and reduced dependency on traditional energy sources. Market trends show a focus on yield enhancement, cost reduction, and process optimization to meet growing demand for eco-friendly products.

news.headline: SMEC signs MOU to acquire Hyundai Wia's Machine Tool Division, aiming to solidify position as top 2 in market.
news.summary: SMEC Co., Ltd (099440) anticipates consolidating its standing as one of the top two firms in the machine tool sector. The company is diversifying its operations from semiconductors and IT to automobiles to leverage synergy. The groundwork for this expansion was laid in Los Angeles on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: DCO and UNDP partner to bridge global digital divide and progress towards SDGs through collaboration.
news.summary: A collaboration has been established between DCO and UNDP in New York to address the global digital divide and enhance efforts towards achieving the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). This partnership aims to promote digital collaboration on a global scale.

news.headline: QIAGEN N.V. to release Q3 2024 results and webcast. Venlo, The Netherlands, Oct. 10, 2024. (NYSE: QGEN, Frankfurt Stock Exchange: QIA)
news.summary: In Venlo, The Netherlands, on October 10, 2024, QIAGEN N.V. (NYSE: QGEN) (Frankfurt Stock Exchange: QIA) disclosed intentions to unveil its third quarter 2024 results.

news.headline: 10x Genomics' Q3 sales disappoint, revenue at $151.7M vs consensus $162.245M, CEO optimistic about future.
news.summary: 10x Genomics Inc (NASDAQ: TXG) saw its stock price decline following the release of its preliminary financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The company reported total revenue of around $151.7 million, which fell short of the consensus estimate of $162.245 million. This represents a 1% decrease compared to the same period in 2023. Serge Saxonov, the Co-founder and CEO of 10x Genomics, expressed disappointment in the results stating, “Third-quarter revenue fell short of our expectations.” The company implemented modifications in its commercial processes and organization aimed at enhancing effectiveness. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hurricane Milton's impact in Florida expected to be costly. Federal Reserve monitoring inflation closely.
news.summary: Florida is anticipated to suffer significant and enduring consequences from the superstorm, with the Federal Reserve closely monitoring forthcoming inflation figures. The impact is projected to result in substantial financial losses as the state starts to recover from the devastation.

news.headline: ECB Account: The risk of undershooting 2% is becoming non-negligible.
Alliance Witan PLC: Newly appointed board members (UPDATED).
ECB Account: Gradually removing restriction is okay if the baseline holds.
Owens Corning named one of 100 Best Corporate Citizens of 2024, ranked fourth overall in U.S. public companies.
news.summary: In Toledo, Owens Corning (NYSE: OC) has been named one of the 100 Best Corporate Citizens of 2024 by 3BL. This recognition places them fourth among the largest U.S. public companies. Owens Corning's commitment to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) transparency and performance earned them this distinction. Remarkably, this marks the seventh year in a row that Owens Corning has ranked in the top 10 overall and the fifth consecutive year leading the capital goods industry in this list.

news.headline: Real estate company Real surpasses 22,000 agents with the addition of 55 agents from Grant Johnson Group.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Toronto and New York, Real Brokerage has surpassed the milestone of 22,000 agents with the incorporation of the Grant Johnson Group, consisting of 55 agents from the St. Paul/Minneapolis region. The addition of this group marks a significant achievement for Real, showcasing their continued growth and expanding presence in the real estate market.

news.headline: Core42 in Abu Dhabi expands its AI cloud services with NVIDIA Accelerated Computing. No specific numbers mentioned.
news.summary: Core42, based in Abu Dhabi, has announced an expansion of its AI cloud services by leveraging NVIDIA accelerated computing technology. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's capabilities in artificial intelligence and cloud computing. The partnership with NVIDIA will enable Core42 to leverage advanced computing power to drive innovation and enhance performance. The collaboration signifies a significant step forward for Core42, marking a commitment to staying at the forefront of cutting-edge technology. This development showcases Core42's dedication to providing state-of-the-art AI solutions.

news.headline: Global pharmaceutical excipient for taste masking market to reach $1.58 billion by 2034, with a projected CAGR of 5%. United States to hold 86.2% market share in North America. Excipient utilization crucial for patient compliance.
news.summary: The global pharmaceutical excipients for taste masking market is forecasted to reach a valuation of US$ 972.9 million in 2024 and grow at a CAGR of 5% from 2024 to 2034. Taste plays a significant role in patient compliance in the healthcare sector, and natural taste enhancers like spices and herbs are used to mask unpleasant tastes of drugs. There have been advancements in developing flavor-masking compositions and reducing bitterness in formulations to improve palatability. The market is expected to generate revenue of US$ 1.58 billion by 2034, with South Korea expanding at a CAGR of 4.9% and the United States holding a market share of 86.2% in North America by 2034. Sales of taste-masking pharmaceutical excipients are projected to increase at a CAGR of 5.2% through 2034.

news.headline: Founders Metals Inc. secures C$15 million through a private placement of 6,250,000 common shares at C$2.40/share.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 10, 2024, Founders Metals Inc. revealed an agreement with a group of underwriters led by BMO Capital Markets, alongside Paradigm Capital and Clarus Securities. The agreement entails the purchase of 6,250,000 common shares (referred to as "Common Shares") of the company on a bought deal basis through a private placement. The cost per Common Share stands at C$2.40, resulting in total earnings of approximately C$15 million from the offering. Founders Metals Inc. is identified by the stock symbols TSX-V: FDR, OTCQX: FDMIF, FSE: 9DL0.

news.headline: ECB Accounts: It's too early to declare victory.
ECB Accounts: It would sometimes be appropriate to ignore volatility in oil prices.
ECB Account: It's best to maintain full optionality to react freely.
Stagwell (STGW) to discuss financial results for Q3 2024 on Nov 7, 2024 before market open.
news.summary: In New York on October 10, 2024, Stagwell, a challenger network aiming to revolutionize marketing, announced that it will disclose its financial performance for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. The report is scheduled to be released on Thursday, November 7, 2024, prior to the opening of the market. Stagwell plans to conduct a video webcast alongside the disclosure. Stagwell is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol STGW.

news.headline: FERMWORX, based in Columbus, GA, awarded significant DoD contract through Distributed Bioindustrial Manufacturing Program.
news.summary: A major contract has been awarded to FERMWORX, a renowned fermentation company in Columbus, Georgia. The Department of Defense (DoD) has selected FERMWORX for a significant project under the Distributed Bioindustrial Manufacturing Program. This achievement marks a significant milestone for the company and highlights its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Duchesnay Pharmaceutical Group expands nausea treatment to 40 countries, part of Canada's Global Hypergrowth Project.
news.summary: A Quebec-based company, Duchesnay Pharmaceutical Group (DPG), has been selected as one of the eight companies participating in the Global Hypergrowth Project by the Government of Canada. This achievement reflects the company's strong growth. The announcement was made on October 10, 2024, in Blainville, QC.

news.headline: ECB Accounts: Economic outlook for the Euro-area was more concerning.
ECB Accounts: Core inflation and services inflation might be stickier and not decline as much as currently expected.
Yuanyu partners with Guofu in $30M licensing deal for matchmaking services in Asia, aiming to tap into $4B market.
news.summary: In Windsor Mills, MD, on October 10, 2024, Connexa Sports Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: YYAI), holding a 20% stake in Yuanyu Enterprise Management Co., Limited (YYEM), a Hong Kong-focused entity within the Love & Marriage sector globally, has sealed an exclusive license deal with Guofu Enterprise Management Co., Limited, also based in Hong Kong. The agreement covers regions including Hong Kong, Japan, South Korea, and Southeast Asia - Brunei, Cambodia, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar, the Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, and Vietnam. The agreement, building upon a previous term sheet, entails minimum royalty payments of over $30 million to YYEM until 2026.

news.headline: ZenaTech's ZenaDrone launches IQ Nano drone for indoor use in warehouses and facilities, aims to improve productivity.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 10, 2024, ZenaTech, Inc. (Nasdaq: ZENA), a tech company focused on AI drone and enterprise SaaS solutions, revealed the launch of IQ Nano by its subsidiary, ZenaDrone. The IQ Nano is part of the IQ series of drones suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. The product targets sectors like warehousing and logistics, offering cost savings and increased productivity for tasks like indoor inspections, monitoring, tracking, and inventory management.

news.headline: Purple Biotech to share CAPTN-3 data at EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics - platform boosts anti-tumor immunity.
news.summary: CAPTN-3 is a groundbreaking tri-specific antibody platform designed for combating cancer. It is activated under specific conditions and uniquely engages both T cells and NK cells. This innovative approach aims to enhance the immune response against tumors, potentially revolutionizing cancer treatment.

news.headline: Theratechnologies' Q3 2024 financial results show positive net income, strong performance. TSX: TH, NASDAQ: THTX.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Theratechnologies Inc. (TSX: TH, NASDAQ: THTX) announced its business highlights and financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024, which ended on August 31, 2024. The company, specializing in biopharmaceuticals, reported in US dollars.

news.headline: Zevra Therapeutics to join Rare Disease Panel at 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit, presented by Maxim Group LLC on Oct 17, 2024 at 2pm ET.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Celebration, Florida, Zevra Therapeutics, Inc. (NasdaqGS: ZVRA), a company specializing in rare disease therapeutics, revealed that Neil F. McFarlane, the President and CEO, is scheduled to join a Rare Disease Panel at the 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit. This event is hosted by Maxim Group LLC and will take place on Thursday, October 17, 2024, at 2 p.m. ET.

news.headline: Brixton Metals drills 254m at 0.48 g/t Gold, with notable sections including 41m at 1.08 g/t and 6m at 4.19 g/t at Thorn Project.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 10, 2024, Brixton Metals Corporation (TSX-V: BBB, OTCQB: BBBXF) released the initial findings from the 2024 drilling efforts at the Trapper Gold Target within its Thorn Project. The Thorn Project, owned entirely by Brixton, is situated in Northwest British Columbia, approximately 90km east of Juneau, Alaska.

news.headline: Opthea to present Sozinibercept at Innovate Retina on Oct 17, 2024 in Chicago; treatment for wet AMD.
news.summary: Opthea Limited, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company traded on ASX/NASDAQ under OPT, revealed that sozinibercept will be featured at the Innovate Retina Meeting on October 17, 2024, in Chicago, Illinois. The meeting aims to focus on innovative treatments for prevalent retinal diseases such as wet age-related macular degeneration (wet AMD). This announcement was made on October 10, 2024, originating from Melbourne, Australia, and Princeton, N.J.

news.headline: University of Manitoba and Magellan Aerospace collaborate to monitor space objects over Canada and South Pole.
news.summary: A groundbreaking satellite initiative to safeguard Earth's orbital space is currently in progress in Toronto. University of Manitoba (UM) and Magellan Aerospace (Magellan), in conjunction with Canada’s Department of National Defence (DND) science and technology organization, Defence Research and Development Canada (DRDC), and the United Kingdom’s Defence Science and Technology Laboratory (Dstl), have joined forces to bring this project to fruition. The endeavor involves the collaboration of various entities to ensure its success. New launch companies are also contributing to this project, which emphasizes the importance of protecting the Earth's orbital environment.

news.headline: NexGold and Signal Gold merge to form a top Canadian gold developer with 4.7M ounces; $11.5M funding and debt restructuring.
news.summary: Simultaneously $11.5 million in private placement equity financing was secured alongside a proposed debt restructuring.

news.headline: ECB Accounts: Inflation was then expected to decline towards the target over the second half of next year.
Lineage Inc. to report Q3 2024 results on Nov 6, 2024, with an 8:00 am ET conference call. Website: ir.onelineage.com.
news.summary: The company Lineage, Inc. (NASDAQ: LINE) from Novi, Michigan, has confirmed that it will release its financial outcomes for Q3 of 2024 on Wednesday, November 6, 2024, before the market opens. A conference call to review these results is set for 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Interested parties can access a live webcast of the call on Lineage's Investor Relations site at ir.onelineage.com. Moreover, an audio replay of the conference call will be accessible for one week post the event.

news.headline: ECB Accounts: The risk of delays in reaching the ECB’s target was seen to warrant some caution to avoid dialling back policy restriction prematurely.
ECB Accounts: It therefore needed to be carefully monitored whether inflation would settle sustainably at the target in a timely manner.
Inflammatix hires 3 industry veterans to lead; focusing on commercialization of TriVerity™ Test.
news.summary: Inflammatix, Inc., a leading molecular diagnostics company, has made significant additions to its executive team to accelerate the commercialization of their TriVerity™ Test. Dr. Sam Ajizian has been brought on as the Chief Medical Officer, while Jamie Lewis will serve as the Chief Commercial Officer, and Laura Spencer Garth will take the role of General Counsel. These appointments were made public in Sunnyvale, California, on October 10, 2024. The TriVerity™ Test is a cutting-edge diagnostic tool that promises to transform the way diseases are detected and treated. This move reflects Inflammatix's commitment to driving innovation in healthcare.

news.headline: DeFi Technologies' Valour introduces Valour Sui (SUI) ETP on Spotlight Stock Market, expanding digital asset offerings.
news.summary: DeFi Technologies' subsidiary, Valour, has recently introduced the Valour Sui (SUI) ETP on the Spotlight Stock Market in Sweden, expanding its range of cutting-edge digital asset offerings. This move presents investment prospects in Layer-1 blockchain technology through the Valour Sui ETP.

news.headline: Reklaim Ltd. reduces debt by 11% through strategic debt conversion initiative, marking financial stability.
news.summary: Reklaim Ltd. (OTCQB: MYIDF) (TSXV: MYID) has achieved a significant milestone in its financial stability with a recent debt settlement. This achievement comes after a year of consistent profitability for the company. Based in New York, Reklaim is a destination for consumers looking to access various services.

news.headline: SensiML integrates RISC-V processor for IoT Edge AI, subsidiary of QuickLogic (NASDAQ: QUIK).
news.summary: SensiML™ Corporation, an AI software leader for IoT and a subsidiary of QuickLogic (NASDAQ: QUIK), unveiled in Portland, Oregon on October 10, 2024, their latest move towards enhanced flexibility for IoT edge AI development. They have integrated a RISC-V® processor into their offerings.

news.headline: Immatics plans $150 million public offering of ordinary shares for T cell immunotherapies in cancer.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Immatics N.V., a biopharmaceutical company based in Houston, Texas and Tuebingen, Germany, revealed the initiation of an underwritten public offering for its ordinary shares. Being listed on NASDAQ as IMTX, Immatics is actively engaged in the exploration and advancement of T cell-redirecting cancer immunotherapies. The public offering's completion is dependent on market conditions and various factors, with no guarantee of timing or the final scale and conditions of the offering.

news.headline: Intellia Therapeutics reschedules investor webcast to review NTLA-2002 Phase 2 data for October 24 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A webcast for investors to discuss the Phase 2 data of NTLA-2002 is scheduled for Thursday, October 24 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
